title: Deepak snapback at 50 SMA (intraday timing)
rules_high_confidence: Index snapback: price below 50 SMA channel
Buy at bottom of channel, target 50 SMA area as resistance
Intraday entry timing: morning if good setup; EOD half-position if closing strong
filters_used: Dailylevel trend filter (must confirm on daily first), Daily OHLCV for trend filter
known_strengths: Deterministic Spec — Deepak Singhania Snapback to 50SMA Intraday (QL_DEEPAK_SNAPBACK_50SMA_INTRADAY)
